{{Quote|''[Stuttering]'' Uh, we're the Tambles and we need the help of a mighty Ewok warrior like you.|A Tamble, to [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]]|<ref name="Warrior" />}}
The '''Tambles''' were a group of diminutive [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] beings who lived on the [[Moon/Legends|forest moon]] of [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]. They bounced along the surface of rivers; without [[Water/Legends|water]], they would [[Death/Legends|die]].<ref name="Warrior" />

==Biology and appearance==
{{Quote|If we don't get some water soon, we'll die.|A Tamble, to [[Teebo/Legends|Teebo]]|<ref name="Warrior" />}}
Tambles were small beings who required water to survive. When deprived of water, the Tambles became shorter and thinner. However, when they were exposed to water, they inflated and could bounce or float along the water in rivers. Tambles had webbed hands and feet, with three fingers on the hands and three toes on the feet. Additionally, Tambles had big blue eyes, with some possessing eyelashes.<ref name="Warrior" />
